html:
Exclusive to:

“Walter's sanity loss due to damage is halved.”

-

The Pinetree Pioneer Hat is a Characters-exclusive Dress Item craftable only by Walter, using 4 Silk. Walter also starts the game with 1 Pinetree Pioneer Hat in his inventory.

It restores 2 Sanity per minute while worn, provides 20% Wetness resistance and 60 of Overheating protection. It divides the sanity loss of Walter when taking damage by two.

Pioneer's Panache

Walter with the "Pioneer's Panache" skill improves the Pinetree Pioneer Hat stats:

  • Increase wetness protection from 20 -> 35%
  • Increase heat insulation from 60 -> 120 points.
  • Decrease sanity loss when Walter gets hit from x1 -> x0.5 sanity multiplier.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Walter has a unique Pinetree Pioneer Hat Skin corresponding to each of his collections. However he always spawns in the Constant with the default look of the hat and must either use a Clean Sweeper to change skin of his hat or craft a new one with the desired skin.

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Pinetree Pioneer Hat
"Form and function over fashion."
Object Info
Perk
Halves Walter's sanity loss when losing health and reduces sanity drain from missing health to 25% of the rate.
Delays Overheating (60).
+2.00/min
Equipable
10 days
Repaired By Sewing
Does not stack.
Protection
20% resistance
60
Crafting
×4 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"walterhat"
“I was never exactly "outdoorsy" in my youth.”
–Wilson
“Okay fine, so I wasn't "in" girl scouts so much as "crashed" girl scouts.”
–Willow
“Will tiny hat fit on Wolfgang's mighty head?”
–Wolfgang
“It doesn't suit me.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO INTEREST IN THIS”
–WX-78
“I suppose one must try to stay young at heart.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lookit that, it's got a little maple leaf on it!”
–Woodie
“It's not quite my style.”
–Maxwell
“The helm öf the "Pinetree Piöneer" clan.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we be a Pioneer too?”
–Webber
“A tidy little chapeau.”
–Warly
“Look like friend!”
–Wormwood
“I'll stick to my hardhat.”
–Winona
“Imps and uniforms rarely mix.”
–Wortox
“Is good color.”
–Wurt
“A Pinetree Pioneer should always wear appropriate headgear.”
–Walter
“What a funny little hat! Sadly, I don't think it would suit me.”
–Wanda
“Walter's sanity loss due to damage is halved.”
-
The Pinetree Pioneer Hat is a Characters-exclusive Dress Item craftable only by Walter, using 4 Silk. Walter also starts the game with 1 Pinetree Pioneer Hat in his inventory.
It restores 2 Sanity per minute while worn, provides 20% Wetness resistance and 60 of Overheating protection. It divides the sanity loss of Walter when taking damage by two.
Pioneer's Panache[edit | edit source]

Increase wetness protection from 20 -> 35%
Increase heat insulation from 60 -> 120 points.
Decrease sanity loss when Walter gets hit from x1 -> x0.5 sanity multiplier.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
Walter has a unique Pinetree Pioneer Hat Skin corresponding to each of his collections. However he always spawns in the Constant with the default look of the hat and must either use a Clean Sweeper to change skin of his hat or craft a new one with the desired skin.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Pinetree Pioneer là một Trang phục dành riêng cho Nhân vật, chỉ có Walter mới có thể chế tạo bằng cách sử dụng 4 Tơ. Walter cũng bắt đầu trò chơi với 1 Mũ Tiên phong Cây thông trong kho của mình.
